text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Israel brutal strikes cause massive destruction round Tebnine Governmental Hospital, Southern Lebanon
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 以色列的残酷空袭导致黎巴嫩南部特布宁政府医院周边地区遭到大规模破坏

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF released footage showing the elimination of militants identified hiding in bushes, as well as the discovery of an underground weapons storage facility in southern Lebanon. During the activity, the 869th Unit identified two attempts by militant cells to carry out attacks against the troops. In response, the militants were targeted and eliminated in a drone strike and a joint operation with the Israeli Air Force. The troops also located a large cache of weapons, including rifles, anti-tank launchers, and an underground storage site containing mortar shells, the military says. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了视频，显示消灭了躲藏在灌木丛中的武装分子，并在黎巴嫩南部发现了一个地下武器储存设施。行动期间，第869部队识别出武装分子小组试图对部队发动两次袭击。作为回应，武装分子在无人机袭击和与以色列空军的联合行动中被锁定并消灭。军方称，部队还发现了大量武器，包括步枪、反坦克发射器，以及一个装有迫击炮弹的地下储存点。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Reuters: A senior Iranian official says Pakistan’s army chief’s visit to Iran helped reduce differences in some areas. The official said there are greater hopes for extending the ceasefire and holding a second round of talks, while major disagreements remain over nuclear issues, including Iran’s highly enriched uranium and the duration of nuclear restrictions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 路透社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长对伊朗的访问有助于减少双方在某些领域的分歧。该官员表示，人们对延长停火和举行第二轮会谈抱有更大希望，但在核问题上仍存在重大分歧，包括伊朗的高浓缩铀问题和核限制的期限。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Macron: Yesterday, I spoke with Iranian President Massoud Pezeshkian, as well as with U.S. President Donald Trump. I urged the resumption of the negotiations suspended in Islamabad, the clearing up of misunderstandings, and the avoidance of any further escalation. It is essential, in particular, that the ceasefire be strictly respected by all parties and that it include Lebanon. It is equally important that the Strait of Hormuz be reopened unconditionally, without restrictions or tolls, as soon as possible. Under these conditions, negotiations should be able to resume quickly, with the support of the key parties concerned. France and the United Kingdom will also host a conference in Paris this Friday, bringing together by videoconference non-belligerent countries ready to contribute, alongside us, to a multilateral and purely defensive mission aimed at restoring freedom of navigation in the strait when security conditions allow. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 马克龙：昨天，我与伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬以及美国总统唐纳德·特朗普进行了交谈。我敦促恢复在伊斯兰堡暂停的谈判，消除误解，并避免任何进一步的升级。特别重要的是，各方必须严格遵守停火协议，且停火范围应包括黎巴嫩。同样重要的是，霍尔木兹海峡应尽快无条件重新开放，不得有任何限制或通行费。在这些条件下，在相关主要各方的支持下，谈判应能迅速恢复。法国和英国还将本周五在巴黎召开会议，通过视频会议召集那些准备与我们一道，为恢复海峡航行自由做出贡献的非交战国，并在安全条件允许时开展纯防御性的多边任务。推文

text: Open Source Intel Fire overnight at Australia's Corio Refinery. One of two remaining refineries in the country. Produces half of Victoria's fuel. Energy minister confirmed disruptions to jet fuel and gasoline output. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044690711468036189/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 澳大利亚科里奥炼油厂昨晚发生火灾。这是该国仅存的两家炼油厂之一，生产维多利亚州一半的燃料。能源部长证实航空燃油和汽油产量受到干扰。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044690711468036189/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Greta Thunberg is very upset Israel passed the death penalty law for terrorists who were captured on October 7th https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044689687961374913/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Former Secretary of State John Kerry on Iran: "You will only resolve this through a negotiation. They're not going to surrender. We're obviously not about to. They've got to get to that table." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044687778101817506/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 前国务卿约翰·克里谈伊朗：“你只能通过谈判来解决这个问题。他们不会投降。我们显然也不会。他们必须坐到谈判桌前。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044687778101817506/video/1 推文

text: Israel says Netanyahu will soon speak with Lebanon’s president Joseph Aoun, according to an Israeli official.
text_zh: 据一位以色列官员称，以色列表示内塔尼亚胡很快将与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩通话。

text: Brazilian President Lula: Donald Trump has no right to wake up in the morning and threaten a country.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：唐纳德·特朗普没有权利在早上醒来后就威胁一个国家。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iranian ambassador to Pakistan Moghadam, speaking at a conference in Islamabad: We will do talks in Pakistan and nowhere else, because we trust Pakistan. For us, the USA is a country that can never be trusted. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使穆加达姆在伊斯兰堡的一次会议上发言：我们只会在巴基斯坦进行会谈，不会在其他任何地方，因为我们信任巴基斯坦。对我们来说，美国是一个永远无法信任的国家。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated RT @toonie_tuesday : 🚚 Cargo Van = Z Cargo 200 💀 Today we’re standing with @AlexBondODUA to raise funds for the 20th NGU Brigade "Lyubart”, a unit that has been carrying the weight of impossible missions on their backs. These fighters are the ones who break through when the night is thickest, who hold ground that should not be holdable, who run toward the places everyone else is running from. Right now, they’re doing all of that without the transport they need. The cargo van will let them move faster, resupply under fire, and pull their people out when the battlefield turns cruel. 🅿️ 🅿️ : umc4429917@gmail.com (“Toonie in comment”) Goal: $10,000. Donate €2 £2 $2 📬 screenshot in replies & repost Link to This Week’s Toonie in comments. Watch the video, vist our profile, bookmark, like, retweet, comment, quote tweet, it all helps with visibility. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 转发 @toonie_tuesday : 🚚 货运面包车 = Z 货运 200 💀 今天我们与 @AlexBondODUA 一起为第 20 NGU 旅“Lyubart”筹集资金，这是一支肩负着不可能完成的任务的部队。这些战士是在最黑暗的时刻挺身而出的人，是坚守着本不该坚守的阵地的人，是奔向所有人都在逃离的地方的人。现在，他们正缺乏所需的交通工具。货运面包车将让他们能够更快地移动，在炮火下进行补给，并在战场变得残酷时将他们的人员撤出。 🅿️ 🅿️ : umc4429917@gmail.com (“Toonie in comment”) 目标：10,000 美元。捐赠 2 欧元 2 英镑 2 美元 📬 在回复中附上截图并转发。本周 Toonie 的链接在评论中。观看视频，访问我们的个人资料，收藏、点赞、转发、评论、引用转发，这一切都有助于提高曝光度。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. Senate voted 40-59 against Sen. Bernie Sanders' measure to block arms sales to Israel. 85% of Senate Democrats voted to block the sales. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044680932452409731/photo/1 Senate Democrats failed to block arms sales to Israel. 40 voted against bulldozer sales, 36 against 1,000-lb bombs. Both measures killed by Republican opposition. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国参议院以 40 票对 59 票否决了参议员伯尼·桑德斯提出的阻止向以色列出售武器的措施。85% 的参议院民主党人投票支持阻止这些销售。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044680932452409731/photo/1 参议院民主党人未能阻止向以色列出售武器。40 票反对出售推土机，36 票反对出售 1,000 磅炸弹。两项措施均因共和党的反对而被否决。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Navy missile ships intercepted a drone launched from Lebanon overnight. Since the start of Operation Lion's Roar, missile ships have been involved in around 40 aerial defense incidents, detecting and intercepting drones targeting Israel. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044678708078817323/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军海军导弹舰昨晚拦截了一架从黎巴嫩发射的无人机。自“狮吼行动”开始以来，导弹舰已参与了约 40 起防空事件，探测并拦截了针对以色列的无人机。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044678708078817323/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated RT @ChrisO_wiki : 1/ A prominent Russian warblogger and Ka-52 helicopter pilot appears to have killed himself after posting an apparent farewell video on Telegram. 'Voivode', real name Alexey Zemtsov, says he has committed suicide due to pressure from his superiors. ⬇️ https://x.com/i/status/2044517187252080948/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 转发 @ChrisO_wiki : 1/ 一位著名的俄罗斯战争博主兼 Ka-52 直升机飞行员在 Telegram 上发布了一段疑似告别视频后似乎自杀了。“Voivode”，真名 Alexey Zemtsov，称他因上级的压力而自杀。 ⬇️ https://x.com/i/status/2044517187252080948/video/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 POLITICO: So far, the US Navy hasn’t found any Iranian mines
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 POLITICO：到目前为止，美国海军尚未发现任何伊朗水雷

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry on Iran War: You will only resolve this through a negotiation. They’re not going to surrender. We’re obviously not about to. They’ve got to get to that table. There’s got to be space… to reach an agreement.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里谈伊朗战争：你只能通过谈判来解决这个问题。他们不会投降。我们显然也不会。他们必须坐到谈判桌前。必须有空间……来达成协议。

text: Professor Robert Pape on Iran War: We are not on a path of peace. We are on a path… the war is metastasizing. What you see are troop movements… going in one direction. There’s not troop movements coming out. There’s troop movements going in.
text_zh: 罗伯特·佩普教授谈伊朗战争：我们并没有走在和平的道路上。我们走在一条……战争正在扩散的道路上。你所看到的是军队调动……正朝着一个方向前进。没有军队撤出。只有军队进入。

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 China’s foreign ministry issued a travel safety alert warning citizens of risks when traveling to the U.S., and advised them to avoid entering through Seattle-Tacoma International Airport. The alert follows an incident where China claims 20 Chinese scholars with valid visas were denied entry after “unreasonable questioning” by U.S. border officials, with Beijing citing repeated cases of harassment targeting Chinese nationals. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 中国外交部发布旅行安全提醒，警告公民前往美国旅行的风险，并建议他们避免从西雅图-塔科马国际机场入境。此前发生了一起事件，中国称20名持有有效签证的中国学者在遭到美国边境官员“无理盘问”后被拒绝入境，北京方面援引了多起针对中国公民的骚扰案件。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱Israel targeted the area near the hospital in Tebnine, southern Lebanon, with an aistrike early this Thursday morning. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage of the aftermath of tonight’s airstrikes in the area near the hospital in Tebnine in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱以色列于本周四清晨对黎巴嫩南部特布宁（Tebnine）医院附近的区域进行了空袭。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 今晚黎巴嫩南部特布宁医院附近区域遭空袭后的现场画面。@wfwitness

text: Iran has decided to move its entire education system online starting April 21. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 伊朗已决定从4月21日起将其整个教育系统转为线上。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: Open Source Intel Sen. Fetterman: “I don’t understand why other Democrats can’t acknowledge that pulverizing the Iranian military and their capabilities…that’s a good thing overall.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044677237543141482/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel New footage shows the Kahramanmaraş attacker, İsa Aras Mersinli, recorded by classmates shortly before the shooting. He killed 9 and injured 13 before dying by suicide. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044676087658013148/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）新画面显示，卡赫拉曼马拉什（Kahramanmaraş）袭击者伊萨·阿拉斯·梅尔辛利（İsa Aras Mersinli）在枪击发生前不久被同学录下。他在自杀前杀害了9人并造成13人受伤。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044676087658013148/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel So PM Netanyahu and Lebanon president Aoun will be speaking directly? U.S. President Donald Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice! President DJT." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）所以内塔尼亚胡总理和黎巴嫩总统奥恩将直接对话？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间争取一点喘息空间。两位领导人已经很久没有交谈过了，大约34年了。明天就会发生。太棒了！DJT总统。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - 开源情报（Open Source Intel）推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Magyar has spent the last few days meeting with Orbanistas who lied about him and his family incessantly, blocked him from addressing the nation, and did their utmost to keep him from winning a fair election. From Hungary's president -- who must invite Magyar to form a government before resigning -- to this state TV presenter, he's met them to say: "Hello, here's why you're out of job. Goodbye." Breathtaking. Long unofficially banned from appearing on state TV, incoming Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar appears on a channel to which he was previously not allowed only to announce an end of "North Korean" style Orban media monopoly. https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2044415740715958557/video/1 - Jay in Kyiv tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @michaeldweiss：马扎尔（Magyar）过去几天一直在会见那些不断对他及其家人撒谎、阻止他向全国发表讲话、并竭尽全力阻止他赢得公平选举的欧尔班支持者。从匈牙利总统——他在辞职前必须邀请马扎尔组建政府——到这位国家电视台主持人，他会见他们是为了说：“你好，这就是你失业的原因。再见。” 令人叹为观止。长期以来被非正式禁止在国家电视台露面的匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）出现在一个他此前不被允许进入的频道，只是为了宣布结束“北韩”式的欧尔班媒体垄断。 https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2044415740715958557/video/1 - Jay in Kyiv 推文

text: Open Source Intel I’m sure this is going to help your negotiations. Btw did you get your paycheck? I heard the regime is very tight. Trump is one of the reasons that proves the existence of the Satan in the world. https://twitter.com/IRANinTJ/status/2044111103609974849/video/1 - Iran Embassy in Tajikistan tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）我相信这会对你们的谈判有所帮助。顺便问一下，你拿到工资了吗？我听说政权非常拮据。特朗普是证明世界上存在撒旦的原因之一。 https://twitter.com/IRANinTJ/status/2044111103609974849/video/1 - 伊朗驻塔吉克斯坦大使馆推文

text: Open Source Intel Official Lebanese sources told Saudi outlet Al-Hadath that they learned the date of negotiations with Israel from Trump's tweet. They say no official confirmation on the date has been received. Trump spoke yesterday with Rubio and U.S. Ambassador to Lebanon Michel Issa on Lebanon and the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）黎巴嫩官方消息人士告诉沙特媒体Al-Hadath，他们是从特朗普的推文中得知与以色列谈判日期的。他们表示尚未收到关于该日期的官方确认。特朗普昨天与卢比奥及美国驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨（Michel Issa）就黎巴嫩和停火问题进行了交谈。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Donald Trump: 🗣️ “We’re trying to create a bit of breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It’s been a long time since the two leaders have spoken — around 34 years. That will change tomorrow.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044670595795714509/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan army commander Munir visited Tehran yesterday and heads to the U.S. tomorrow as part of mediation efforts between Washington and Tehran. - Al Jazeera https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044670000036774399/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）巴基斯坦陆军司令穆尼尔（Munir）昨天访问了德黑兰，并将于明天前往美国，作为华盛顿与德黑兰之间调解努力的一部分。 - 半岛电视台 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044670000036774399/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Mohsen Rezaee, senior military adviser to Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: “We will by no means give in on our 10 conditions in the negotiations through a naval blockade. Unlike the Americans who are afraid of continuous war, we are fully prepared and familiar with a long war.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei）的高级军事顾问穆赫森·雷扎伊（Mohsen Rezaee）：“我们绝不会在通过海军封锁进行的谈判中放弃我们的10项条件。与害怕持续战争的美国人不同，我们已做好充分准备，并熟悉长期战争。”

text: There are growing signs that talks between United States and Iran might finally be heading toward a deal, with Pakistan acting as a go-between. Pakistani officials believe they've made real progress, shuttling messages back and forth and trying to bridge gaps that caused earlier negotiations in Islamabad to fail. Source: Al Jazeera
text_zh: 越来越多的迹象表明，美国和伊朗之间的会谈可能终于要达成协议，巴基斯坦在其中充当中间人。巴基斯坦官员认为他们已经取得了实质性进展，在双方之间传递信息，并试图弥合导致早先伊斯兰堡谈判失败的分歧。来源：半岛电视台

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 US Warns Buyers of Iranian Oil Face Fresh Sanctions The US imposed new hostile sanctions on Iran's oil transportation infrastructure (targeting dozens of individuals, companies, and vessels) and warned of secondary sanctions on buyers of Iranian oil, including potential action against China. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated the US is willing to apply secondary sanctions if Iranian oil money sits in foreign banks.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国警告伊朗石油买家将面临新制裁 美国对伊朗的石油运输基础设施实施了新的敌对制裁（针对数十名个人、公司和船只），并警告称将对伊朗石油买家实施二级制裁，包括可能针对中国采取行动。财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，如果伊朗石油资金存放在外国银行，美国愿意实施二级制裁。

text: Open Source Intel IDF troops from the 769th Brigade, operating under the 91st Division in southern Lebanon, thwarted two attempted attacks by terrorist cells. The cells were identified and eliminated through drone and joint airstrikes. Forces also uncovered weapons including Kalashnikov rifles, anti-tank rockets, RPG launchers, and an underground storage facility containing mortar shells. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军第769旅在黎巴嫩南部第91师指挥下，挫败了恐怖分子小组的两次袭击企图。这些小组通过无人机和联合空袭被识别并消灭。部队还发现了包括卡拉什尼科夫步枪、反坦克火箭、RPG发射器以及一个装有迫击炮弹的地下储存设施在内的武器。推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 🇹🇷 BREAKING | The Russian Federation threatens Europe with strikes on factories where drones are allegedly produced for Ukraine. 🔹 The Russian Federation threatens Europe with strikes on factories where, as they claim, unmanned aerial vehicles are produced for Ukraine. The Russian Ministry of Defense has published the addresses of these facilities—- the list includes: the United Kingdom, Germany, Denmark, Latvia, Lithuania, the Netherlands, Poland, the Czech Republic, Spain, Italy, Israel, and Turkey. 🔹 The Russian Ministry of Defense assesses the supply of unmanned aerial vehicles to Ukraine as a "deliberate step leading to a sharp escalation of the military-political situation." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 🇹🇷 突发 | 俄罗斯联邦威胁欧洲，称将打击据称生产乌克兰无人机的工厂。 🔹 俄罗斯联邦威胁欧洲，称将打击据称生产乌克兰无人机的工厂。俄罗斯国防部公布了这些设施的地址——名单包括：英国、德国、丹麦、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、荷兰、波兰、捷克共和国、西班牙、意大利、以色列和土耳其。 🔹 俄罗斯国防部将向乌克兰供应无人机评估为“导致军事政治局势急剧升级的蓄意步骤”。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired a missile from Lebanon at the southern Haifa Bay area overnight. No sirens sounded. The missile struck an open area. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党昨晚从黎巴嫩向海法湾南部地区发射了一枚导弹。没有警报声响起。导弹击中了一片开阔地。推文

text: Open Source Intel I am trying to understand what President Trump means over here. U.S. President Donald Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice! President DJT." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 我试图理解特朗普总统在这里的意思。美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间争取一点喘息空间。两位领导人已经很久没有交谈了，大约34年了。明天就会发生。太好了！特朗普总统。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senate Democrats failed to block arms sales to Israel. 40 voted against bulldozer sales, 36 against 1,000-lb bombs. Both measures killed by Republican opposition. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 参议院民主党人未能阻止对以色列的武器销售。40票反对推土机销售，36票反对1000磅炸弹。两项措施均因共和党的反对而被否决。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese leadership embarrassed after Israel’s ambassador said both sides agreed Hezbollah is a shared enemy Rising concern in the anti-Hezbollah camp: talks with Israel could push Hezbollah to try to kiII President Joesph Aoun and Lebanon PM Salam. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044662403518914614/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 在以色列大使表示双方都同意真主党是共同敌人后，黎巴嫩领导层感到尴尬。反真主党阵营日益担忧：与以色列的谈判可能会促使真主党试图暗杀约瑟夫·奥恩总统和黎巴嫩总理萨拉姆。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044662403518914614/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ BREAKING: Albanese proudly announces he has just secured 100 million litres of diesel to fix the fuel crisis. 😳 For comparison Australia's daily diesel consumption is approximately 92 million litres per day. 😂 So to be clear, Albanese is giving himself a pat on the back for organising a mere 1 days worth of diesel. 🤦‍♂ @AussieCossack
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ 突发：阿尔巴尼斯自豪地宣布，他刚刚获得了1亿升柴油以解决燃料危机。 😳 相比之下，澳大利亚每天的柴油消耗量约为9200万升。 😂 所以说清楚点，阿尔巴尼斯因为仅仅组织了1天的柴油用量而沾沾自喜。 🤦‍♂ @AussieCossack

text: 🇫🇷 France has cancelled the arrest of the tanker Deyna, which was heading from Russia under a Mozambican flag and was seized on March 20, and released it, according to the prefecture. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇫🇷 据省政府称，法国已取消对悬挂莫桑比克国旗、从俄罗斯出发并于3月20日被扣押的油轮“Deyna”号的逮捕令，并将其释放。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克的一家企业遭到袭击 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: Lebanon has not yet been briefed on last night’s Israeli security cabinet discussions, according to a Lebanese official. The official said Lebanon assesses that Israel is seeking to secure a victory in Bint Jbeil before any diplomatic progress moves forward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：据一位黎巴嫩官员称，黎巴嫩尚未获悉昨晚以色列安全内阁讨论的情况。该官员表示，黎巴嫩评估认为，以色列正寻求在任何外交进展推进之前，在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）取得胜利。 @wfwitness
